sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18072" key="au)xmhroko/mhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐχμηρο-κόμης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n18072.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with squalid hair,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:41:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
